rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical 3/10 score and rest on the same job-relevant reasoning: ~6 months of C++ versus an 8-year minimum, no large-scale cloud/distributed-infrastructure leadership, and no formal cloud/DevOps team leadership. The only differences are rewording and slightly fuller restatement of the same requirements. Nothing in the variant keys off Berlin vs. San Francisco — no location-driven score change, new concern, or shifted reasoning appears.
